title: Delicate Springy Saudi Arabian Lamb Pilaf
description: A savory and springy Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb, melted butter, and a pasta water emulsion, perfect for a brunch mood. This Whole30 friendly recipe is a delicious and healthy option.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the basmati rice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the pasta water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
